Evidence provided in prior audit. This eveidence would be for our former subleased office space. Deactivation from the access control system was managed by our landlord. Employee access is deacactivated within the WeWork portal on last day of employment. Request has been placed with WeWork to generate a deactivation report. I can share screenshots with proof of deactivation, but the portal does not provide confirmation; simply immediate deactivation of the user account.
